mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll growth exceeding 130k signals strong labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 130k, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 12-month windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production and housing starts signal weakening supply-side capacity, creating deflationary pressures that depress S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show positive correlation (IC > 0.1) with combined INDPRO/HOUST declines, or the interaction effect reverses direction in 30%+ of test periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly GDP growth rate above 3% indicates robust demand conditions that drive corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns show negative correlation (IC < -0.05) with GDPC1 growth above 3% in 24-month rolling windows, or the signal fails in 40%+ of triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI inflation rate above 2.2% triggers central bank tightening expectations, increasing equity risk premiums and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.2, or the signal's IC falls below -0.03 in 12-month rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate above 8.5% signals slack in the labor market, reducing consumer confidence and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where UNRATE exceeds 8.5, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in 18-month rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in residential investment (RSAFS) and industrial production (INDPRO) indicates expanding demand across sectors, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show negative correlation (IC < -0.05) with combined RSAFS/INDPRO increases, or the interaction effect reverses direction in 35%+ of test periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production below 95.0 signals weakening supply-side capacity, creating deflationary pressures that depress S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in 55%+ of instances where INDPRO falls below 95.0, or the signal's IC drops below -0.03 in 12-month rolling windows.
